resources.string: "Special thanks to the following open source tools, libraries and projects. Without them, SuperDisplay wouldn't exist."
"If you have problems using the app or some other question, don't hesistate to send us an email at support@kelocube.com!"
Please make sure your device is online.
Please wait a few seconds and try again.
Thank you for purchasing SuperDisplay! The application will be unlocked once you have completed the purchase.

"Thank you so much for buying my app. I've spent countless nights developing SuperDisplay, so your support means the world to me. One of the best things in having developed an application is hearing people's feedback. If you have a moment to spare, I would appreciate it hugely if you could leave a rating or review on the Play Store. In addition to making me happy, reviews help SuperDisplay grow and ensure that I'm able to dedicate time to working on it in the future as well. Please don't feel pressured to leaving a rating, however - if you don't want to, just click \"No thanks\" and you will not be bothered again unless you reinstall the app.
Should you have any questions or face any problems while using the app, don't hesitate to contact me at support@kelocube.com. Enjoy SuperDisplay!
Otto Itkonen (KeloCube) Developer of SuperDisplay"
Since you already own Superbrush, you DO NOT need to pay again! Just click Redeem IAP to continue using the app.
We hope you enjoyed the trial! Please purchase the full version to continue using SuperDisplay.
If you enjoyed using the app, please consider buying the unlimited version!

" If you like the app, please consider buying it! You can keep using the app for free for up to 3 days.
If you need any help, check out the FAQ at https://superdisplay.app/help or send us a message at support@kelocube.com! "

Thanks for downloading SuperDisplay! SuperDisplay is not a free app, but you can try it for free for up to 3 days. Should you face any issues during your trial, you can get help at superdisplay.app/help or by contacting support@kelocube.com. We hope you will enjoy using the app!
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Waiting for PC app. Make sure USB connections via ADB are enabled in the SuperDisplay Windows app settings.

"USB tethering is the simplest method to set up and provides the fastest connection, but it may not be available on all devices. If you are unable to connect via USB tethering, you can connect via ADB (Android debug bridge) instead. ADB requires additional setup; see superdisplay.app/help for more information.
Note that if your Android device has an active internet connection, your PC may connect to the internet through it while tethering is active. This may incur unexpected charges depending on your data plan.
You can change your preference later in the settings."
The maximum amount of items has been reached.
The connection was closed because an unexpected error occurred. If you have allowed automatic error reporting, the developer has been notified of the problem. Click help for more info.
The connection was rejected on the host computer.
Lost connection to the host computer.
The given address is not valid.
The specified host does not seem to be running the SuperDisplay PC app.
Please enable automatic error reporting from the settings to submit an error report.
Please leave your email address and click submit to send an error report.

Your error report is on the way. To complete the report, please send a separate error report from the Windows driver by opening SuperDisplay Settings on Windows and clicking on Submit an error report. Thanks!
Could not open USB tethering settings. If USB tethering is not supported on your device, you may try to connect via ADB instead. See help for more information.
Your PC does not support the selected resolution, please select a different resolution.

"Your PC's video card (GPU) does not have a video encoder, so SuperDisplay has to use your CPU. CPU encoding is slower than GPU encoding, so SuperDisplay will not be able to run at 60 frames per second. You may also see increased CPU usage while running SuperDisplay. See superdisplay.app/help#no-encoder for more information."
Your PC does not seem to be running the same version of SuperDisplay as the Android app. Please update your PC and Android apps to the latest versions.
The maximum number of selected icons has been reached
No icons found for this search

" AboutLibraries is a library to offer you all the information you need of your libraries!

Most modern apps feature a Used Library-section, which requires information about those respective libs. As it gets annoying to always copy those strings to your app, I have developed this small helper library to provide the required information. "
"AndroidMaterialPreferences is an Android-library, which provides various preferences, which are designed according to Android 5's Material Design guidelines even on pre-Lollipop devices. "
DragListView can be used when you want to be able to re-order items in a list, grid or a board. It also supports horizontal swiping of items in a list.
FastAdapter, the bullet proof, fast and easy to use adapter library, which minimizes developing time to a fraction...

A fully customizable icon picker dialog that provides easy access to quality icons without having to include them individually in your project. Icons are bundled in icon packs, which are distributed as separate artifacts. Icon packs are defined by XML, each icon consisting of an ID, a SVG path, a viewport size, a category and a list of tags for searching.
"LZ4 compression for Java, based on Yann Collet's work available at http://code.google.com/p/lz4/."
Client library for the Google Play licensing server.

" In order to fix issues as seamlessly as possible, we would like to collect automatic error reports if the app encounters an error. Will you allow these reports? See superdisplay.app/help#privacy for more info. "
"SuperDisplay was unable to connect to the virtual input or display driver. Please try removing and installing the application again, or contact support@kelocube.com if this doesn't help."

Looks like something went wrong. If this keeps happening, please send an error report by opening SuperDisplay Settings on Windows and clicking on Submit an error report. This will help us diagnose and fix the issue.
Please make sure your GPU drivers are up to date and working properly.

SuperDisplay was unable to verify your purchase or start a trial. Please make sure your Android device is connected to the internet. This error may also be caused by an IAP unlocker app, so please uninstall such apps before using SuperDisplay.

"We're really sorry, but your PC cannot run SuperDisplay because it doesn't have a video encoder. In some cases, this error may be caused by misconfigured GPU drivers, so make sure they are working if you have a relatively new GPU."
SuperDisplay was unable to allocate enough memory (10 MB) to start display mirroring. Please try restarting the application or your Android device.
Please unplug the USB cable and try again.
Make sure your device is connected to a Windows PC and you are not using a charge-only USB cable. See %L{superdisplay.app/help#charge-only} for more info.
Something went wrong. Please unplug the USB cable and try again.
Unfortunately USB connections are not supported on Chromebooks. Please visit %L{https://superdisplay.app/help#chromebook-setup} for more info.
Tap anywhere to return to Windows.
Your Windows driver has a newer version than this app. Please check the Play Store for app updates.
Please update the Windows driver by opening SuperDisplay settings on your PC and clicking on Check for updates.
"Try removing the USB cable for a few seconds and try again. See %L{superdisplay.app/help#no-connection} if this doesn't help."
"Try removing the USB cable for a few seconds and try again. If this doesn't help, please enable developer mode and USB debugging (see %L{superdisplay.app/help#adb-setup})."
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view

" * Use touch to control Windows * Use a pressure-sensitive stylus to draw in Windows applications * Zoom and rotate the screen with touch gestures * Use a Bluetooth or attachment keyboard with Windows * Customizable shortcut buttons for actions such as Ctrl+Z "

"Tap this button to switch between touch functions.

Tap and hold this button to open the menu and access the action buttons. Customize the menu or hide it completely from the settings."

If Windows maps the touch screen to the wrong display, please reconnect.

Visit superdisplay.app/help if you have trouble with pressure-sensitivity.
Select the key combination sent when tapping and holding the undo button.
These settings should not be changed in most cases.
Read about how your data is handled at superdisplay.app/help#privacy.
Disable video hardware acceleration if you are experiencing corrupted or blurry video. Not recommended unless necessary.
Select the refresh rate of the virtual display. 90/120 Hz is not recommended unless you have a powerful PC and your phone or tablet has a high refresh rate display.
This is an advanced settings, and should not be changed in most cases. The recommended value is 80.
This is an advanced settings, and should not be changed in most cases. Display resolution can be changed from Windows display settings, not here.
Select what sampling method is used when zooming. Point sampling may produce sharper edges for pixel art, but otherwise linear sampling is recommended.
"Draw with high and low pressure until you're happy with the calibration, or adjust the slider to set the active pressure range manually."
To draw with the SonarPen in Windows, make sure the pen is the active touch mode. Tap the button in the top-left corner of the screen to toggle the touch mode.
Please do not change this value unless instructed to do so.
Select what touching the screen does when cropping is not active.
SuperDisplay has reached the 6-hour connection limit. Please restart the connection to continue.

There was a problem contacting the licensing server to verify your purchase. Please make sure that you have an active internet connection and try again. Note that your license only needs to be verified when connecting to a new PC, which means that you can use the app in offline mode indefinitely after verifying the license once. If you believe this is an error, please forward your receipt to support@kelocube.com and we will help you out.
Press and hold to save current crop
Tapping the menu button will cycle through these modes.
"The selected resolution is not supported by your Android device. Please select a smaller display resolution from Windows' display settings or lower the transport resolution from the settings."

You PC is running an outdated version of the SuperDisplay driver. To take full advantage of the latest features and bugfixes, update the driver by opening SuperDisplay Settings from the start menu and clicking on Check for updates.
